title: Magical French Cookie Crepes
description: A yeasty and tender French dish featuring cookies and a lamination puff, served on a hot stone plate, this dessert is a nostalgic treat for the senses. It is halal friendly and perfect for special occasions.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the sifted flour, granulated sugar, active dry yeast, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the warm whole milk, large eggs, and melted unsalted butter.
Slowly pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Let the batter rest in a warm place for 1 hour, or until it has doubled in size.
Heat a hot stone plate over medium heat and brush with a small amount of melted butter.
Pour a small amount of the batter onto the hot stone plate and tilt to evenly coat the surface.
Sprinkle a few crushed cookies onto the batter and fold the crepe in half.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, or until the crepe is golden brown and the cookies are toasted.
Repeat with the remaining batter and cookies.
Serve the crepes warm, garnished with additional crushed cookies if desired.
